item.title: Intro to MySQL arch
item.description: please note if not explictly specified, the MySQL version is 8.0+. So some will be different if you are using 5.6+ or 5.7+. The MySQL database can be divided into two parts: server layer and storage engine. Server layer Most thing happens here, like connection management, authentication, SQL parser, optimizer. All cross storage engine also exist here, views, triggers and built-in functions. Storage engine keep data on disk files and provide api for server layer to manipulate data.
